name: Kai — Plannivo AI Agent (Optimized)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messages: ($('Build System Prompt').item.json.sessionMessages || []).concat([{ role: "user", content: $('Build System Prompt').item.json.userMessage, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }, { role: "assistant", content: $input.item.json.output, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }]), userId: $('Build System Prompt').item.json.userId, userRole: $('Build System Prompt').item.json.userRole, kbSnapshot: $('Build System Prompt').item.json.kbSnapshot || undefined, kbFetchedAt: $('Build System Prompt').item.json.kbFetchedAt || undefined }) }}

parameters.name: get_accommodation_options
parameters.description: Accommodation units with pricing. Optional: type.

parameters.name: get_weather
parameters.description: Wind/weather forecast for Urla. Required: date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: get_customer_packages
parameters.description: Student packages with remaining hours, serviceId, serviceName. Required: customerId (UUID).

parameters.name: create_booking
parameters.description: Create booking. ONLY after YES. Required: serviceId (from get_customer_packages), date (YYYY-MM-DD), startHour. Optional: instructorId, customerPackageId, paymentMethod, notes.

values.name: customerPackageId
values.description: Package UUID from get_customer_packages. Pass this for package-based bookings — hours deducted automatically.

values.name: paymentMethod
values.description: package (if customerPackageId given), wallet, cash, or card. Defaults to package if customerPackageId is set.

parameters.name: reschedule_booking
parameters.description: Reschedule an existing booking to a new date/hour. Only for 24+ hours before the lesson. Confirm new date and time with user first. Required: bookingId, newDate (YYYY-MM-DD), newHour (e.g. 10 or 14.5).

parameters.name: get_accommodation_options
parameters.description: Accommodation units with pricing. Optional: type.

parameters.name: create_accommodation_booking
parameters.description: Book accommodation. ONLY after YES. Required: unitId, checkInDate, checkOutDate. Optional: guestsCount, notes.

values.name: filter
values.description: Optional filter string. Leave empty if not needed.

values.name: filter
values.description: Optional filter string. Leave empty if not needed.

parameters.name: add_student_note
parameters.description: Add student note. Required: studentId (UUID), note.

parameters.name: save_student_doc
parameters.description: Save Google Doc reference. Required: studentId, googleDocId, googleDocUrl.

parameters.name: cancel_booking
parameters.description: Cancel own booking. Confirm first. Required: bookingId (UUID). Optional: reason.

parameters.name: search_customers
parameters.description: Search customers by name/email/phone. Required: query.

parameters.name: check_wallet_balance
parameters.description: Wallet balance for any customer. Required: customerId (UUID).

parameters.name: get_booking_list
parameters.description: List bookings with filters. Optional: date, start_date, end_date, instructorId, customerId.

values.name: date
values.description: Exact date filter YYYY-MM-DD (optional, use for specific day)

values.name: start_date
values.description: From date YYYY-MM-DD inclusive (optional, use for upcoming/future queries)

parameters.name: create_booking
parameters.description: Create booking for any customer. ONLY after YES. Required: serviceId, date, startHour. Optional: instructorId, paymentMethod, notes, customerId.

parameters.name: get_instructor_schedule
parameters.description: Instructor schedule. Required: instructorId (UUID). Optional: date.

parameters.name: add_student_note
parameters.description: Add student note. Required: studentId (UUID), note.

parameters.name: save_student_doc
parameters.description: Save Google Doc reference. Required: studentId, googleDocId, googleDocUrl.

parameters.name: send_notification
parameters.description: In-app notification. Required: title, message. One of: targetUserId or targetRole.

parameters.name: send_email
parameters.description: Send email. Required: to, subject, body.

parameters.name: get_services
parameters.description: Lesson services with pricing. Optional: category, level.

parameters.name: get_accommodation_options
parameters.description: Accommodation units with pricing. Optional: type.

values.name: filter
values.description: Optional filter string. Leave empty if not needed.

parameters.name: create_accommodation_booking
parameters.description: Book accommodation. ONLY after YES. Required: unitId, checkInDate, checkOutDate. Optional: guestsCount, notes, guestId.

parameters.name: cancel_booking
parameters.description: Cancel booking. Confirm first. Required: bookingId (UUID). Optional: reason.

values.name: filter
values.description: Optional filter string. Leave empty if not needed.

parameters.name: get_my_subscriptions
parameters.description: Active memberships for any user. Optional: userId.

values.name: filter
values.description: Optional filter string. Leave empty if not needed.

notes:
## Optimized Workflow — Changes from v1
1. Window Buffer Memory REMOVED — custom session (Fetch/Save Session) handles memory.
2. Role-based Switch routes to 4 separate agents: Public(5 tools), Customer(13), Staff(7), Admin(27).
3. Outsider gets 5 tools, Student/trusted_customer 13, Instructor 7, Admin/Manager all 27.
4. Temperature lowered to 0.3, maxTokens reduced to 512.
5. Tool descriptions shortened — saves ~30% input tokens per call.
6. Merge node collects whichever agent branch ran.
7. SETUP: Set GEMINI_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID and KAI_AGENT_HEADER_AUTH credential IDs.
